title: Sonic Boom Shard
description: Adds a craftable weapon that shoots the Warden's Sonic Boom attack.
body:
## This data pack adds  the Sonic Boom Shard into Minecraft!

The shard uses a player's XP-Levels to fire the same attack that the Warden is so iconic and known for. The player needs to be **at least level 30** in order to fire the weapon, and it consumes 5 levels upon use.

The Sonic Boom Shard can be crafted using **1 sculk shrieker and 8 echo shards**, giving these items even more uses!

For more information, check out this showcase video:
